title: README PUT example omits author but update_book requires it
evidence: README.md PUT curl sends only {"title": ...}, but app.py:139 returns 400 when author is missing — the documented example would fail
suggestion: Either document that PUT requires both title and author, or support partial updates in update_book

title: GET /books ?author= is a substring LIKE match, not exact
evidence: app.py:101 uses "WHERE author LIKE ?" with f"%{author_filter}%"
suggestion: Acceptable per spec; note that ?author=A matches any author containing 'A'. Tests (test_app.py:117) rely on substring behavior.
